config: default (reyn.local.yaml: flash-lite all tiers, hot_list_n=10, REYN_EMPTY_STOP_RETRY=1)

vs_b42.note: B42 W2 was rubric-only (events_pass=null due to crash recovery). B43 W2 is events-gated normally. s9 unblocked (B->R). s3 regressed (V->R: 'no files found' false negative — read_local_files MCP returned empty for op_runtime/). s4 regressed (V->R: skill_builder skill_run_interrupted, invalid JSON from LLM). s5/s6 verified (word_stats_demo stable). s2 verified (read_local_files for cron/scheduler.py). s1/s7/s9 stable R (unsafe-python / eval schema / unsafe-python attractors persist). Net: same V count as B42, but R differs (V count matched via different scenarios passing).

vs_b41.note: Substantial improvement over B41 rubric+events scoring. word_stats and read_local_files (single-file) now reliably verified.

scenarios.notes: skill_run_failed event present. Persistent unsafe-python gate attractor on index_docs. Same as B42/B41/B39.

new_findings.observation: s3 regressed V->R relative to B42 W2 rubric-only score. Inline router returned 'I can't find any files in the src/reyn/op_runtime/ directory' — false negative. No skill_run_spawned for read_local_files, no permission_denied. tool_called -> tool_returned -> chat_turn_completed_inline.
new_findings.evidence: events/agents/dogfood-b43-2-s3/chat/2026-05/2026-05-20T063301.jsonl shows single tool_called/tool_returned cycle then inline answer. No read_local_files skill spawn.
new_findings.hypothesis: Either MCP list_files returned empty for op_runtime/ (path resolution issue) or LLM accepted an empty tool result without retrying with a different approach. Cross-check vs B43 W1 / other workers' s3 to determine if reproducible.
new_findings.action: Flag for lead-coder. Compare against B43 W1/W3 s3 (if same scenario set runs) to check reproducibility.

new_findings.observation: s4 regressed V->R relative to B42 W2 rubric-only score. skill_run_interrupted at the second llm_called of the skill build sequence. LLM (flash-lite) returned invalid JSON.
new_findings.evidence: events/agents/dogfood-b43-2-s4/skill_runs/.../skill_builder.jsonl shows phase_completed for first phase, lint_plan_completed for second preprocessor, then context_built -> llm_called -> skill_run_interrupted (no llm_response_received).
new_findings.hypothesis: LLM noise — flash-lite occasionally returns malformed JSON mid-build. Not a structural regression. B42 W2 V verdict was rubric-only on a different run that didn't hit this LLM noise.
new_findings.action: Note. Consider retry policy for skill_builder phases or downgrade severity if N=1.

new_findings.observation: Eval postprocessor schema validation continues to fail (B41-NF-S7 attractor persists post-B43 Phase 1-5 intervention refactor).
new_findings.evidence: events/agents/dogfood-b43-2-s7/skill_runs/.../eval.jsonl shows control_ir_failed during preprocessor iterate (judge_phase sub-skill) followed by postprocessor python step then skill_run_interrupted. Reply: 'evaluation failed schema validation due to missing required properties'.
new_findings.hypothesis: Per session_resume notes: PR #115 D2-wrapper revert hypothesis still pending. B43 fix wave did not address this family.
new_findings.action: Flag — B41-NF-S7 still alive after B43. Tracks against existing finding.

new_findings.observation: Crash-recovery infrastructure improvement: B43 W2 completed all 9 scenarios end-to-end with events.jsonl persisted normally (no crash truncation as in B42).
new_findings.evidence: All 9 agent directories have history and events; verdicts events-gated normally rather than rubric-only.
new_findings.hypothesis: B43 fix wave (PR #248/253/257/265 + Phase 1-5 intervention refactor) appears to have stabilized dispatch loop sufficiently to complete 9-scenario batch without mid-batch crash.
new_findings.action: Positive infrastructure signal. Not a regression.
